meaning: 赛伯伊王国(经营黄金、香料和宝石的古代王国,基督教<<圣经>>中译作 Sheba)
examples: Go to Saba, we can swim in the sea with the fish.
A hawksbill turtle glides just above the floor of a Marine sanctuary near Saba, Netherlands Antilles.
Daniel Saba, the chairman of Perupetro, says that exploration is yielding results again after decades in which little was found.
Corbis recently got into the agency game too, picking up Sygma, Saba and the Stock Market.
But the actress and musician Saba Anglana, who records under the name Saba, sings in Somali.
